brand.name: GreenRidge Landscape & Design
brand.tagline: Landscaping & Outdoor Renovation in San Jose & the South Bay
brand.footerTagline: San Jose's landscaping & outdoor renovation specialists. Creating modern, functional outdoor spaces throughout the South Bay.
brand.heroSubtext: Modern landscaping and outdoor living spaces designed to elevate homes across San Jose and the South Bay.
brand.servicesHeadline: Complete Landscaping Services for the South Bay

services.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom landscape plans brought to life — from concept to final plant. Every design is tailored to your property, your lifestyle, and the California climate.
services.heroText: Great outdoor spaces start with great design. GreenRidge develops comprehensive landscape plans for South Bay properties — then executes every detail with precision.

services.name: Paver Installation
services.description: Premium natural stone and concrete paver surfaces for walkways, patios, and pool decks. Built to last in the California sun without shifting or cracking.
services.heroText: Pavers done right — from design to final seal. GreenRidge installs premium paver systems across the South Bay with craftsmanship and materials that stand the test of time.
bullets: Polymeric sand finishing and professional sealing

services.name: Patio Installation
services.description: Thoughtfully designed outdoor living floors — built for entertaining, everyday use, and lasting curb appeal. We handle every detail from base prep to final seal.
services.heroText: A well-designed patio changes how you experience your property. GreenRidge creates custom patios for South Bay homeowners who want beauty, functionality, and durability.
bullets: Custom patio design and layout planning
Outdoor kitchen and fire feature prep

services.name: Driveway Installation
services.description: Stunning, durable driveways that make a statement from the street. We work with pavers, asphalt borders, and custom edging for a finished, upscale look.
services.heroText: Your driveway sets the tone before anyone reaches your front door. GreenRidge installs custom driveways that blend seamlessly with your landscape and elevate your property's value.

services.name: Front Yard Landscaping
services.description: First impressions matter. We design and install front yard landscapes that elevate your home's curb appeal with seasonal color, structure, and clean lines.
services.heroText: Curb appeal is the first thing anyone notices. GreenRidge creates polished, well-designed front yard landscapes that make South Bay homes stand out on the block.
bullets: Custom planting and garden bed design

services.name: Back Yard Landscaping
services.description: Turn your backyard into the retreat you've always wanted — custom planting beds, lawn restoration, trees, and borders designed around how you actually live.
services.heroText: Your back yard should be a space you actually want to spend time in. GreenRidge designs and installs custom back yard landscapes for South Bay homeowners — built to look stunning and last for years.

services.name: Outdoor Living Spaces
services.description: Full outdoor environments — pergolas, fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and custom seating. Designed and built so your backyard becomes a true extension of your home.
services.heroText: Outdoor living is more than a trend — it's a lifestyle. GreenRidge designs and builds complete outdoor environments that become the most-used space on your property.
bullets: Fire pit and outdoor fireplace builds

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: GreenRidge completely transformed our backyard into a space we actually enjoy spending time in. The design felt modern, clean, and exactly the California outdoor vibe we wanted.

reviews.name: Sarah L.
reviews.text: From the first meeting to the final walkthrough, the entire process felt organized and professional. The patio, lighting, and landscaping came out beautiful.

reviews.name: Daniel R.
reviews.text: We interviewed several landscaping companies and GreenRidge stood out immediately. Their attention to detail and overall design vision made a huge difference in the final result.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Our backyard now feels like an extension of the house. The turf, pavers, and outdoor seating area completely changed how we use the space. Couldn't be happier with the outcome.

faqs.a: We serve homeowners throughout San Jose and the South Bay Area — including Los Gatos, Saratoga, Cupertino, Sunnyvale, Santa Clara, Mountain View, Palo Alto, and surrounding communities.

faqs.q: How do I get a free estimate?
faqs.a: You can call or text us at (408) 512-3074 or submit the contact form on our website to schedule a free estimate. We'll discuss your project goals, take a look at the space, and provide recommendations based on your vision and budget.

faqs.q: What landscaping services do you offer?
faqs.a: GreenRidge Landscape & Design specializes in custom landscaping, patios, pavers, artificial turf, outdoor lighting, planting, backyard renovations, and outdoor living spaces designed for modern California homes.

faqs.q: What's the difference between landscaping and lawn care?
faqs.a: Lawn care usually focuses on maintenance services like mowing, edging, and fertilizing. Landscaping is more focused on design and installation — including patios, pavers, turf, planting, lighting, drainage, and complete outdoor renovations.

faqs.q: When's the best time to start a landscaping project?
faqs.a: Spring and fall are the most popular seasons, but we work year-round. We recommend booking at least 1–2 weeks out to secure your spot on the schedule.

faqs.q: How long does a landscaping project usually take?
faqs.a: Project timelines depend on the size and complexity of the work. Smaller projects may take a few days, while larger outdoor renovations can take several weeks from preparation to final installation.

faqs.q: Is artificial turf a good option in San Jose?
faqs.a: Yes. Artificial turf is a popular option throughout San Jose because it stays green year-round, reduces water usage, and requires much less maintenance than natural grass.
